subtext: Decorate your store this summer and win a chance to meet
hero_tagline: Participate in the Bajaj Finserv's Summer Store Decoration contest now!
tl-subtext: Use Bajaj Finserv's collaterals and your creativity to get your store summer-ready.
subheader-tl: Share your videos/photos with the hashtag #CashKyunEMIKaro and tag @bajajfinserv_emihaina on Instagram.
